{{Quote|Frustrated by the Republic's sluggish response to the Separatist crisis, many citizens are inspired by Captain Slayke's will to act. Many feel a war is inevitable, and don't understand the Judiciary and Jedi mission to rein in the ''Thranta''. Then, there are also the conspiracy theorists who believe this entire thing was premeditated.|Grabda Weng|<ref name="HNN 55">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|55|jediwatch/1359_1.html|Jedi Taskforce Dispatched to Reel in Thranta}}</ref>}}
'''Grabda Weng''' was a professor of socio-politics at the [[University of Alderaan/Legends|University of Alderaan]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
